description: Per-route First Load JS budgets (gzipped bytes). Fails CI if measured size exceeds budget × (1 + tolerance). See docs/frontend/bundle-size-budget.md.

/shared-games.note: Baseline 2026-05-17 (was 570217 from 2026-04-29). +4.7% drift from cumulative main-dev → main-staging promotion (#979).

/shared-games/[id].note: Wave A.4 detail. Baseline 2026-05-17 (was 606268 from 2026-04-29). +4.5% drift from #979 promotion. Aspirational target 45KB documented in docs/frontend/bundle-size-budget.md (out of scope #629; deferred to optimization pass).

/discover.note: Baseline 2026-05-17 (was 619000 from 2026-04-29). Stage 3 catalog landed via #1160 (7-row Discover, +1,563 LOC, no new heavy deps). Code-split follow-up tracked: HorizontalRow below-the-fold via next/dynamic could buy back ~20-40KB.
